recommended.song_name: Wake Me Up When September Ends

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
 I walk a lonely road, the only one that I have ever known[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Don't know where it goes, but it's home to me and I walk alone[/tab]

([ch]Em[/ch]) [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
